biography:
Sauna. Cold plunge. Breathwork. Recovery.
Social wellness in the Strip District.

top_videos.text: You don’t have to be actively training in order to LOVE & partake in contrast therapy! Sometimes is a great way to simply unwind and give your mind a break! We feel so much better mentally and physically after a visit to @MindFuelMethod 🙌
top_videos.author: sarahsmiley
